title: Trace: indexing pipeline
task: I need to understand the full indexing pipeline from when a user runs `claudemem index` to when chunks are stored. Trace the execution path and list the key functions in order. Do NOT make any code changes.
output:
I have enough to provide a complete trace. Here is the full execution path for `claudemem index`:

---

## Indexing Pipeline Execution Path

### 1. CLI Entry (`src/cli.ts`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 1 | `main()` → `switch (command)` → `case "index"` | `cli.ts:270` |
| 2 | `handleIndex(args)` | `cli.ts:682` |

**`handleIndex`** parses flags (`--force`, `--no-llm`, `--concurrency`, etc.), then:
- calls `createIndexer({ projectPath, enableEnrichment, enrichmentConcurrency, onProgress, ... })` (`cli.ts:762`)
- calls `indexer.index(force)` (`cli.ts:782`)

---

### 2. Indexer — Lock & Dispatch (`src/core/indexer.ts`)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 3 | `Indexer.index(force)` | `indexer.ts:303` |
| 4 | `createIndexLock().acquire()` | `indexer.ts:310` — prevents concurrent runs |
| 5 | `this.indexInternal(force, startTime)` | `indexer.ts:325` |

---

### 3. `indexInternal` — Main Pipeline (`src/core/indexer.ts:345`)

| Step | Function | What it does |
|------|----------|--------------|
| 6 | `this.initialize()` | Opens LanceDB store, file tracker, embeddings client, enricher |
| 7 | `this.discoverFiles()` | Walks project directory, applies include/exclude patterns |
| 8 | `fileTracker.getChanges(allFiles)` | Diffs against stored hashes → new/modified/deleted files |
| 9 | `vectorStore.deleteByFile(...)` | Removes deleted/modified files' old chunks from LanceDB |
| 10 | `vectorStore.getChunksWithVectors(...)` | Fetches old vectors for modified files (smart reuse cache) |

Then for each **batch** of files (loop at `indexer.ts:454`):

---

### 4. Phase 1 — Parse & Chunk (per file in batch)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 11 | `readFileSync(filePath)` + `computeFileHash(filePath)` | `indexer.ts:490-491` |
| 12 | `chunkFileByPath(content, filePath, fileHash)` | `indexer.ts:492` → `chunker.ts:712` |
| 13 | `getParserManager().getLanguage(filePath)` | `chunker.ts:718` — detect language |
| 14 | `chunkFile(source, filePath, language, fileHash)` | `chunker.ts:726` (or `fallbackChunk` if unsupported) |
| 15 | `parserManager.parse(source, language)` | `chunker.ts:62` — tree-sitter AST parse |
| 16 | `extractChunksAST(tree, source, language)` | `chunker.ts:69` |
| 17 | `processChildren(rootNode, ...)` | `chunker.ts:101` — walks AST nodes, buffers gap lines |
| 18 | `createCodeChunk(parsed, filePath, language, fileHash)` | `chunker.ts:75` — builds `CodeChunk` with `contentHash` |

---

### 5. Phase 2 — Embed Chunks

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 19 | Cache check: `oldChunksCache.get(filePath).has(chunk.contentHash)` | `indexer.ts:542` — reuse vector if unchanged |
| 20 | `embeddingsClient.embed(texts, progressCb)` | `indexer.ts:597` — calls OpenRouter/Voyage/Ollama API for new chunks |

---

### 6. Phase 2b — Extract & Embed Code Units (AST symbols)

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 21 | `codeUnitExtractor.extractUnits(content, filePath, language, fileHash)` | `indexer.ts:703` |
| 22 | `embeddingsClient.embed(unitTexts, ...)` | `indexer.ts:746` |

---

### 7. Phase 3 — Store

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 23 | `vectorStore.addChunks(chunksWithEmbeddings)` | `indexer.ts:668` — writes `CodeChunk` + vector to LanceDB |
| 24 | `vectorStore.addCodeUnits(unitsWithEmbeddings)` | `indexer.ts:782` — writes `CodeUnit` records |

---

### 8. Phase 4 — Update Tracker

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 25 | `fileTracker.markIndexed(filePath, fileHash, chunkIds)` | `indexer.ts:816` — persists file hash + chunk IDs to SQLite |

---

### 9. Post-batch — Enrichment (optional, if `--no-llm` not set)

After all batches complete:

| Step | Function | Location |
|------|----------|----------|
| 26 | `setIndexVersion(projectPath, CURRENT_INDEX_VERSION)` | `indexer.ts:857` |
| 27 | `enricher.enrich(fileChunksForEnrichment, ...)` | `indexer.ts:~890` — LLM generates file/symbol summaries |
| 28 | Results written back to `vectorStore` as enrichment documents |

---

### Summary Flow

```
handleIndex()
  └─ createIndexer()
  └─ indexer.index(force)
       └─ createIndexLock().acquire()
       └─ indexInternal()
            ├─ initialize()           // open DB, clients
            ├─ discoverFiles()        // glob walk
            ├─ fileTracker.getChanges()
            └─ [per batch]
                 ├─ [per file] chunkFileByPath()
                 │    ├─ parserManager.parse()   // tree-sitter
                 │    ├─ extractChunksAST()
                 │    │    └─ processChildren()  // AST walk
                 │    └─ createCodeChunk()
                 ├─ embeddingsClient.embed()     // API call
                 ├─ vectorStore.addChunks()      // LanceDB write
                 ├─ codeUnitExtractor.extractUnits()
                 ├─ embeddingsClient.embed() [units]
                 ├─ vectorStore.addCodeUnits()   // LanceDB write
                 └─ fileTracker.markIndexed()    // SQLite write
            └─ enricher.enrich()                // optional LLM pass
```

---
